title: Sense Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Sense  (Condition As String) As Boolean
parameters: Condition	Specifies the I/O condition. For details see the Sense Statement in the SPEL+ Language Reference manual.
description: Sets the condition used for Jump Sense. Jump Sense detects whether the arm stopped prior to completing a JUMP instruction (which used a SENSE input) or if the arm completed the JUMP move.
see_also:
Jump, JS

Sense Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .Sense("SW(1) = On)

  .Jump("P1 SENSE")

  stoppedSense = .JS()
End With

C# Example:

m_spel.Sense("Sw(1) = On");

m_spel.Jump("P1 SENSE");

stoppedOnSense = m_spel.JS();
examples: With m_spel .Sense("SW(1) = On) .Jump("P1 SENSE") stoppedSense = .JS()End With
